_comment: Script-side config. githubLogin scopes the briefing's PR query (CLAUDE.md Agent 2); jiraBaseUrl feeds scripts/fetch-jira.sh; reviewsRoot is the one-click-review cache used by scripts/launch-review.ps1 and scripts/cleanup-reviews.ps1. The browser-side twin is config/dashboard.js — jiraBaseUrl is deliberately present in both, keep them in sync.
